testcase.name: test_project_home_GET

failure.message: TypeError: save() got an unexpected keyword argument 'force_insert'

testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_views.TestView testMethod=test_project_home_GET>
def setUp(self): self.client = Client() self.home_url = reverse('website-home') self.detail_url = reverse('post-detail', args='1') > user = User.objects.create_user( username='123', email='pastas@mail.com', password='Testas12345.')
app\tests\test_views.py:15: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ env1\lib\site-packages\django\contrib\auth\models.py:161: in create_user return self._create_user(username, email, password, **extra_fields) env1\lib\site-packages\django\contrib\auth\models.py:155: in _create_user user.save(using=self._db) env1\lib\site-packages\django\contrib\auth\base_user.py:68: in save super().save(*args, **kwargs) env1\lib\site-packages\django\db\models\base.py:812: in save self.save_base( env1\lib\site-packages\django\db\models\base.py:878: in save_base post_save.send( env1\lib\site-packages\django\dispatch\dispatcher.py:176: in send return [ env1\lib\site-packages\django\dispatch\dispatcher.py:177: in <listcomp> (receiver, receiver(signal=self, sender=sender, **named)) Users\signals.py:9: in create_profile Profile.objects.create(user=instance) env1\lib\site-packages\django\db\models\manager.py:85: in manager_method return getattr(self.get_queryset(), name)(*args, **kwargs) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <QuerySet [<Profile: Sangu Profile>, <Profile: Testas Profile>, <Profile: Linas Profile>]> kwargs = {'user': <User: 123>}, obj = <Profile: 123 Profile>
def create(self, **kwargs): """ Create a new object with the given kwargs, saving it to the database and returning the created object. """ obj = self.model(**kwargs) self._for_write = True > obj.save(force_insert=True, using=self.db) E TypeError: save() got an unexpected keyword argument 'force_insert'
env1\lib\site-packages\django\db\models\query.py:671: TypeError
